Starting July 24, 2024, the WLD tokens allocated to the investors and team members of Tools for Humanity (TFH), early contributors to the Worldcoin project, are scheduled to begin unlocking daily in a linear fashion.
Today, TFH continues to provide services to the Worldcoin Foundation and operates World App, the first Worldcoin-compatible wallet.
Starting on July 24, 2024, approximately 2M WLD held by TFH investors and team members will unlock every day.
The extended unlock schedule has reduced this number by approximately 40% from the original amount (approximately 3.3M WLD per day)."}]}

Worldcoin’s WLD price is flashing a bullish continuation setup after bouncing from its 50-period EMA on the 4-hour chart. A confirmed bull flag breakout above the $0.65–$0.66 zone could send WLD toward $0.81, marking a potential 25% rally from current levels.

But the bigger catalyst may be Worldcoin’s upcoming tokenomics shift. On July 24, WLD’s daily unlock rate is set to drop by 43%, reducing future supply pressure and potentially fueling a pre-event rally.

In this video, we break down the WLD technical chart, bull flag target, key support levels, and why the token unlock-rate cut could matter for Worldcoin’s next big move.
